name: PM Documents
description: Generate project management artifacts and documents using PMI-aligned templates. Produces project charters, risk registers, RACI matrices, stakeholder engagement plans, status reports, WBS dictionaries, lessons learned registers, and change requests — all grounded in PMI terminology via the PM Knowledge Base.

outputPath.description: Directory path where generated artifacts are saved (default: './pm-artifacts')

defaultFormat.description: Output format: 'markdown' for human-readable documents, 'structured' for JSON (default: 'markdown')
